plugins.name: marketing-agent
plugins.description: Self-improving AI marketing operator: research, positioning, offers, plans, copy, creative, lifecycle email, short-form video, CRO, and ICE-scored growth experiments. Connects to Bloom, Higgsfield, Mailchimp, Airtable, n8n, and Gmail.
